---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help improve Mind Forge
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Ingest '...'
2. Query '....'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, unexpected output, or incorrect results.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Arch Linux, macOS 14]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 22.0.0]
- Mind Forge version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- Ollama version (if used): [e.g. 0.5.0]
- OpenCode version: [e.g. 1.17.3]

## Database

If relevant, include the output of:

```bash
sqlite3 ~/.mind-forge/store.db "SELECT id, title, format FROM documents"
```

## Logs

If applicable, include relevant console output or error logs.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
